contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 55
- Description: dao_protocol PR6a: /qr-code-check consumer QR→Stripe flow + migrate server deps to requirements-server.txt
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/39
  
  Details:
  PR6a of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction (Stripe cluster, part 1). Ported qr_code_check_controller: GET /qr-code-check does a QR lookup on the real Agroverse QR codes sheet (sheets/qr_code_lookup.py, cypher_defense service-account key), returns JSON for format=json/error/no-landing, creates a Stripe Checkout session for MINTED status (services/stripe_client.py), reconciles a returned paid session (verify paid + qr match, then mark the QR SOLD + buyer email and append the QR Code Sales row via sheets/qr_code_sales.py using the agroverse_qr_code key), and redirects SAMPLE/GIFT/SOLD to the landing page with UTM params; plus GET /link-email to record a buyer email. Refactored sheets/base.py to support multiple service-account keys (the QR tabs use different keys than the tracking tabs). 9 mocked tests (37 total) pass. Deployed to seni_ror_new:8010; verified the lookup path live (reads the real sheet, returns not-found for a bogus code) — gate off, MINTED/reconcile + Stripe key provisioning are operator-driven at ramp. Also migrated the server dependencies out of the pyproject [server] extra into requirements-server.txt (operator preference for the requirements.txt convention, keeping the lean-CLI split); deploy now uses pip install -e . -r requirements-server.txt.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 91.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
